status: Early MVP - Siemens M60 connect/poll dashboard and command panel wired

runtime_observations.snmp_v2c: timeout on current Siemens M60 target
runtime_observations.snmp_v1: successful connect/poll on current Siemens M60 target

architecture.core_pattern: Abstract Device base class with registry + factory

features: async connect with SNMP version fallback policy
command dispatch with SNMP SET helper
limitations: limited status mapping from raw OIDs

known_risks: stale dev processes can cause frontend/backend websocket mismatch
dev_hygiene: Before fresh runs, kill stale reflex/node dev processes
If websocket connection errors appear, clear .web and restart a single reflex instance

next_priorities: validate Siemens M60 command OIDs against NTCIP 1202 and vendor docs
move Reflex state logic into states/traffic_state.py

planning_agent: roadmap, architecture, OID research, requirement clarification
